title: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) GreenLake Solution Chosen by eir evo
text: Ireland's managed cloud services provider, eir evo, selects Hewlett Packard's (HPE) GreenLake to enhance the cloud service offerings of its Digital Planet platform.

title: Ireland's Largest Managed Cloud Services Provider, eir evo, Selects HPE GreenLake to Modernize Its Private Cloud
text: DUBLIN--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that eir evo, the largest managed cloud services provider in Ireland, has selected the HPE GreenLake edge-to-cloud platform to enhance the cloud services offering for its private cloud platform, Digital Planet. HPE GreenLake will enable Digital Planet to meet increasing demand, accelerate deployment of new services and improve overall customer experience for its private cloud offering.

title: These tech giants should profit from helping companies use AI to cut costs and automate
text: The most important technology trend for 2023? Artifical intelligence.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) to Acquire California's OpsRamp
text: The buyout of San Jose-based OpsRamp is going to strengthen Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Greenlake platform and its position in hybrid cloud, expanding its reach into IT operations management.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise to Acquire OpsRamp, Advancing Hybrid Cloud Leadership and Expanding HPE GreenLake into IT Operations Management
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise to acquire OpsRamp, advancing hybrid cloud leadership and expanding HPE GreenLake into IT Operations Management

title: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Aruba, Microsoft & reelyActive Collabs
text: The latest collaboration with reelyActive and Microsoft brings together Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Aruba IoT Transport & reelyActive Pareto Anywhere for Azure to develop an open-source data converter.

title: Aruba Collaborates with Microsoft and reelyActive to Speed the Migration of IoT Workloads to Microsoft Azure without Custom Engineering
text: SAN JOSE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Aruba, a Hewlett Packard Enterprise company (NYSE: HPE), and reelyActive today announced a new open-source data converter for Microsoft Azure that enables IoT device data that is securely streamed from Aruba Wi-Fi access points (APs) to be used by Microsoft Power BI and other Azure applications.

title: Hewlett Packard (HPE) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Hewlett Packard's (HPE) Q1 results reflect the benefits of an improvement in the supply chain along with the increased demand for its products and services.

title: HP Enterprise (HPE) Reports Q1 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for HP Enterprise (HPE) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended January 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Markets Close Higher; JWN, COST, AI & More Report Earnings
text: While Nordstrom and Costco posted mixed quarters, C3.ai, Broadcom and HPE all beat estimates outright.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (HPE) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Company (NYSE:HPE ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call March 2, 2023 6:00 PM ET Company Participants Jeff Kvaal - Senior Director, Investor Relations Antonio Neri - President & Chief Executive Officer Tarek Robbiati - Executive Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Aaron Rakers - Wells Fargo Meta Marshall - Morgan Stanley Samik Chatterjee - JPMorgan Kyle McNealy - Jefferies Simon Leopold - Raymond James Amit Daryanani - Evercore Sidney Ho - Deutsche Bank Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Ananda Baruah - Loop Capital Operator Good afternoon and welcome to the First Quarter 2023 Hewlett Packard Enterprise Earnings Conference Call. My name is Anthony, and I'll be your conference moderator for today's call.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: HP Enterprise (HPE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 21.15% and 5.46%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: HPE beats on sales, earnings estimates
text: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Co.'s stock HPE, -0.16% initially climbed more than 3% in extended trading Thursday after the computing giant reported quarterly results that beat analyst revenue and earnings estimates. HPE reported fiscal first-quarter net earnings of $501 million, or 38 cents a share, compared with a net loss of $304 million, or 23 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise reports fiscal 2023 first quarter results
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) announces first quarter fiscal year 2023 earnings.

title: Hewlett Packard Enterprise Fortifies Network Security With Acquisition of Security Service Edge Provider Axis Security
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) today announced that it entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Axis Security, a cloud security provider. This acquisition will allow HPE to expand its edge-to-cloud security capabilities by offering a unified Secure Access Services Edge (SASE) solution to meet the increasing demand for integrated networking and security solutions delivered as-a-service.

title: Earnings Previews: Broadcom, Dell, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Marvell
text: In early trading on Wednesday, the Dow Jones industrials were up 0.05%, but the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq were each down 0.19%.
